content:
This is a guide from Mythag University that give a general idea on what to focus on in the In-Game Stores (Not with Real Money).

If there are Errors or you have Opinions of things that can be changed, considering the new wheels too, free let us know.

**Index:**
**Scrips Exchange: **https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710/1442292673636732969
**Sediment Exchange:** https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710/1442292761066733728
**Investigation Exchange: **https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710/1442292859641270364
**D-Jewel's Exchange: **https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710/1442293091657846955

> **Scrip Exchange (Daily)**
> 
> **High Priority** (Buy every day)**:**
> **Mimetic Crystals** - can be converted into any skill and exalt rare material)
> **Aetheric Shards** - used to form the material for max level skills and exalts)
> **Steppenwolf** - good starter covenant set, extra pieces can be converted into Stamps (if you are trying to save Scrips and already have a good set, can skip)
> 
> **Mid Priority** (Buy when needed)**:**
> All the materials for Ascension, Levelling Skills, and Gnosis Elixirs (Elixirs are used by all units to level up, so it’s generally more valuable);
> 
> **Low Priority:**
> **Organic Form** (not commonly used, could farm a good set if you have excess Scrips or be converted to Stamps if you have a lot of extra Scrips).

> **Sediment Exchange (Monthly)**
> 
> **High Priority:**
> **Prototype Horizon** - gives you a dupe for any Unit you have, use only on Limited
> **Timeloop Copy** - gives you a dupe for any Wheel you have, use it only on Limited
> **Pulls** - Buy Limited first, Skip the Standard ones if necessary
> **Battlepass Wheels** (if you bought it)
> Can buy a set of **Paradox** and **Scarlet Embrace** Covenants with good main stat when unlocked (always secure the Prototype first).
> 
> **Mid Priority** (get if you have a good amount of excess Sediments):
> **Remembrance Quills** - used to lock covenant rerolls
> **Mimetic Crystal**
> **Dusk and Dawn** - can be useful for the Gnosis effect and in D-tide (more copies can be taken later if you have the means)
> **Silver Heart** - can be taken if you need another Keyflare wheel for D-tide (can take other copies later, but is used only for more stats);
> 
> **Low Priority:**
> All the rest, don't buy the Posse.

> **Investigation Exchange (Monthly/bi-weekly)**
> 
> **High Priority:**
> **Shards for all SR characters** - dupes for the welfare units (Ogier > Doll/Lotan)
> **Quills** (if you can afford)
> **Pulls** (they don't reset, can take when needed)
> **Gnosis Fragments** - used to create the Gnosis Primer to level up a Unit past 60 (take if you have excess Badges or if needed)
> **Dream of Medicine** (Very Good for mid/late game, unlocked at high account level)
> 
> **Mid Priority:**
> **Crimson Pulse** (used for early game and on some other occasions)
> The other 3 covenants are more niche; the **Photosynthesis rite** can be the most generally useful.

> **Lightless Exchange (Monthly)**
> 
> **High Priority:**
> **Rewinding Time** - best general wheel, E3 first and +12 in time
> **Deathless Ascent** - general aliemus support, useful in D-tide, can go for E3 and maybe more later on
> **Celestial Beast** - usable for exalt or strike damage (can go for E3, sometimes +12 later on),
> **Heart of a Knight** - lower value, but still nice to have for Ogier, particularly (E3 is enough and more only if really needed)
> **Quills**,**Shards**,**Feast from Afar** (one set can be taken, but is a bit more niche)
> 
> **Mid Priority:**
> **Gnosis Fragments**
> 
> **Low Priority:**
> **Rose Scrips**, **Ring of Chamber 36**(very niche covenant, take it only if needed)

> **SR Wheels (IT DEPENDS)** 
> In general, this can fill potential slots in D-tide, putting them to +12 is not a priority (for most of them), but can be done with time (DPS wheels are harder to recommend because you will lose on crit stats if not maxed, take only if you really need the effect)
> 
> **List of SR Wheels:**
> - **Gateway:** Incredibly good, good option to +12 in time.
> - **Blue Stone:** Very niche (Just to give temporary Retain on particular high cost cards, slightly more usable in Aqua)
> - **Witch:** OK tier, it has a particular interaction with some characters (Damage Amplification is effective on exalt too, and it remains effective until you pay a card of the wielder that turn, nice for Liz, 24, etc.)
> - **Million:** OK tier, can be used on a Caro DPS or characters with a lot of multi-hits
> - **35mm:** Niche uses (it can be pretty strong in Mouchette\Other teams that can stack a lot of dr and then burst after triggering it)
> - **Slumber:** Pretty good + Keyflare stat, even better on Aequor (be careful of the Sacrifice build up)
> - **Isarau:** Possibility for counter players, this is the only other SR counter wheel besides the fox
> - **Man in the Mirror:** Usable on Salvador, and can be used as a general secondary source of passive aliemus
> - **Silver Cod:** Good on multihit characters (like Sorel, Aurita, Jenkins, Rykers, maybe 24)
> - **Kiss:** Not particularly effective, but can be used if other aliemus wheels don't work for a character, particularly in Caro
> - **Deep sea:** Usable on aequor DPS (not a lot at the moment) and possibly Myriam
> - **Never Ending:** A bit of a janky Card for DPS, the extra eliemus can be used if one really needs it and doesn’t have Man in the Mirror
> - **Till the Snow Melts:** Maybe usable for DPS that use a lot of cards, like Aurita (still difficult to proc normally)
> - **Poetic:** Not particularly impactful, usable if you don't have better DR options
> - **Fate roulette:** Pretty mid, Possible on Ryker

> **D-Jewels Exchange (Monthly)**
> 
> **High Priority:**
> **Dreamshard** - Basic material to unlock and upgrade the Soulforge Talents, essential for the Astral Realm stages (late-game story and D-tide)
> **Dreamspark**  - Advanced material to upgrade higher levels of the Soulforge talents
> **Unit Shards** - If you have Corposant or want to play with Aurita, take her to E2 first, then +4 and more. If you have Helot: Catena/Mouchette/Pollux or other Caro teams, take Aigis to E1 first (E3 later). Erica can still be used in ultra teams, with a small boost at E3 (not big priority)
> **Re-Evolution** - Ok Aliemus covenant, take a full set
> **Winter's Requiem** - Generally the best for Keyflare, from these options
> **Core Meltdown** - Decent for keyflare but not the most impactful
> **Dream of the Sea** - Can be used to stack strength in Aequor, normally not used on Aurita herself, lower priority
> 
> **Low Priority:**
> All the rest, Cursed Rabbit is sometimes used.
